papers.title_en: CT texture analysis and delta radiomics in predicting R0 resection after preoperative chemotherapy in resectable pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估基于CT的影像组学增量特征（delta-radiomics）在预测可切除胰腺导管腺癌（PDAC）患者接受NALIRIFOX新辅助化疗后实现R0切除的价值。通过分析化疗前后的CT影像纹理变化，研究探讨了影像组学特征作为预测手术切缘阴性（R0）的无创生物标志物的潜力，为优化PDAC的个体化治疗方案提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To evaluate the predictive performance of CT-based radiomic delta-featuresfor predicting R0 resection in resectable pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC)following NALIRIFOX neoadjuvant chemotherapy. Materials and methods This …

papers.title_en: YEARS algorithm for diagnosis of suspected pulmonary embolism in patients with cancer: a randomized clinical trial
papers.tldr: 本研究通过随机临床试验评估了YEARS算法在疑似肺栓塞癌症患者中的应用。针对癌症患者通常直接进行CT检查的现状，研究探讨了该算法在排除肺栓塞方面的准确性与安全性。结果显示，YEARS算法能有效减少不必要的影像检查，且不增加漏诊风险，为癌症患者的肺栓塞诊断提供了更高效、更安全的临床路径。
papers.abstract_en: Importance Although the YEARS algorithm is a safe and efficient way to rule outacute pulmonary embolism (PE), robust evidence on its accuracy in patients withcancer is lacking, and current guidelines suggest proceeding directly to computed …

papers.title_en: Board-Level Performance of Leading Open-Weight Vision-Language Models on the Japanese Diagnostic Radiology Board Examination: Reasoning, Image-Input …
papers.tldr: 本研究评估了领先的开源视觉语言模型（VLMs）在日本放射科医师执业考试（JDRBE）中的表现。通过分析模型在处理医学影像、逻辑推理及多语言环境下的准确率，探讨了这些模型在专业医疗诊断领域的应用潜力。研究重点考察了图像输入和推理过程对最终得分的影响，为未来开发更精准的医学AI辅助工具提供了参考。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose: To evaluate the latest open-weight vision-language models (VLMs) on theJapanese Diagnostic Radiology Board Examination (JDRBE), assessing overallaccuracy and the effects of image input, reasoning, and language. Materials and …

papers.title_en: RADAR: A Difference-Aware Retrieval with Organ-Level Alignment for Change Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中缺乏纵向对比的问题，提出了RADAR框架。该框架通过器官级对齐和差异感知检索技术，实现了对不同时期影像变化的精准捕捉。RADAR能够有效监测疾病进展和治疗效果，在变化描述的准确性上显著优于传统单图生成方法，为临床动态诊断提供了重要支持。
papers.abstract_en: Automated report generation is limited to static, single-image analysis, failing toaddress the critical clinical need for longitudinal comparison in monitoring diseaseprogression and treatment efficacy. To bridge this gap, we introduce the new task of …

papers.title_en: Sharpness matters: Higher image resolution improves generalization and explainability in chest X-ray classification
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了胸部X射线（CXR）分类中图像分辨率对深度学习模型性能的影响。尽管临床通常使用高分辨率图像，但为了降低计算开销，模型训练常采用下采样图像。研究发现，提高输入分辨率不仅能显著提升模型在不同数据集上的泛化能力，还能增强模型的可解释性，使显著性图更准确地定位病灶。这一发现强调了在医疗影像AI开发中保持图像清晰度的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning (DL) chest radiograph (CXR) models are often trained ondownsampled images to reduce computational overhead, despite clinical workflowsoperating at high resolution. Previous studies have investigated the impact of input …

papers.title_en: The Risks and Benefits of Synthetic Medical Images
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估基于CT的影像组学增量特征（delta-features）在预测可切除胰腺导管腺癌（PDAC）患者接受NALIRIFOX新辅助化疗后实现R0切除的预测性能。通过分析化疗前后的影像学变化，研究探索了影像组学在评估治疗反应和手术预后中的潜力，为优化PDAC的临床决策提供了量化依据。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To evaluate the predictive performance of CT-based radiomic delta-featuresfor predicting R0 resection in resectable pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC)following NALIRIFOX neoadjuvant chemotherapy. Materials and methods This …

papers.title_en: A Vision-Language End-to-End Framework for Automated Brain MRI Tumor Report Generation Using 3D GBR UNet Segmentation and Evidence-Aware Retrieval …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对脑部MRI肿瘤分割与报告生成的挑战（如形态异质性和低对比度），提出了一种端到端的视觉语言框架。该框架结合了3D GBR UNet进行精确的肿瘤分割，并利用证据感知检索技术生成放射学报告。通过整合多模态MRI数据（T1, T2等），实现了从3D体积解释到自动化报告生成的闭环，显著提升了临床诊断的效率与准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal MRI faithful brain tumor segmentation and radiological reporting have notbeen achieved because of heterogeneous tumor morphology, low-contrastacquisitions, and the required coherent 3D volumetric interpretation across T1, T2 …

papers.title_en: Dynamic Spectral Calibration Integrated with Diffusion Based Temporal Fusion for Accurate and Interpretable Hyperspectral Brain Tumor Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对高光谱成像（HSI）在脑肿瘤分割中的应用，提出了一种结合动态光谱校准与基于扩散的时间融合的新框架。该方法旨在解决现有技术在处理复杂光谱空间信息时准确性与可解释性不足的问题。通过动态校准光谱特征并利用扩散模型进行时间维度的数据融合，该研究显著提升了分割精度，并为临床诊断提供了更具解释性的结果，是HSI脑肿瘤分析领域的重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: The segmentation of brain tumors, based on hyperspectral imaging (HSI), has beenattracting considerable interest for its capability of providing detailed spectral–spatialinformation about tissue. Current segmentation methods based on HSI have …

papers.title_en: Citation-Aware Continual Pre-Training for Biomedical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对生物医学文献中引用关系被忽视的问题，提出了一种引用感知的持续预训练方法。通过将文献间的引用链接作为结构化知识引入模型训练，该方法能够更好地建模科学研究之间的关联性。实验证明，这种方法显著提升了生物医学语言模型在处理复杂学术关系和下游任务时的性能，为利用结构化文献数据增强领域模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: The biomedical literature contains rich structured knowledge, including citation linksthat encode relationships between scientific studies, but such information is typicallyignored in standard language model pre-training. We propose a citation-aware …

papers.title_en: A knowledge enhanced framework for interpretable medical visual question and answering via large foundation model
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉问答（MVQA）中基础模型缺乏领域知识和可解释性的问题，提出了一种知识增强框架。该框架利用大型语言模型（LLM）和多模态模型，通过整合外部医学知识库来辅助图像理解与推理。实验证明，该方法不仅提升了问答准确率，还为诊断结果提供了逻辑清晰的解释，在提升医疗AI透明度方面做出了重要贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Medical visual question answering (MVQA) plays a vital role in understandingmedical images. However, although foundation models including large languagemodel (LLM) and multimodal model trained on extensive medical datasets have …

papers.title_en: MedAct: Removing the Human Bottleneck in Benchmarking Clinical LLM Safety
papers.tldr: 针对当前临床大模型安全评估过度依赖多选题且人工评估成本高昂的问题，本文提出了 MedAct 框架。该研究旨在消除临床安全基准测试中的人工瓶颈，通过自动化评估流程模拟真实临床场景，为医疗大模型的安全性提供了更高效、更具实践意义的评估手段，有效推动了医疗 AI 的安全部署与风险识别。
papers.abstract_en: Most medical benchmarks for large language models test factual recall throughmultiple-choice questions, but on-the-ground physicians do not have the luxury offour options to choose from. NOHARM (Wu et al., 2025) demonstrated this limitation …

papers.title_en: DTop-p MoE: Sparsity-Controlled Dynamic Top-p MoE for Foundation Model Pre-training
papers.tldr: 针对稀疏混合专家模型（MoE）中固定Top-k路由忽略Token难度差异和层间计算需求不同的问题，本文提出DTop-p MoE。该方法通过动态Top-p路由实现稀疏度控制，允许模型根据Token复杂度和层级特征动态分配专家数量。实验证明该方法在保持计算效率的同时，显著提升了基础模型预训练的性能和灵活性，为高效扩展模型容量提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures are essential for scaling model capacityefficiently, yet the standard Top-$ k $ routing imposes a rigid sparsity pattern thatignores the intrinsic variance in token difficulty and layer-specific computational …

papers.title_en: Yuvion VL: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Adversarial Content and AI Safety
papers.tldr: Yuvion VL 是一系列专为对抗性内容和 AI 安全设计的领域多模态大模型。针对通用模型在识别现实世界多模态风险（如对抗性攻击）方面的不足，该研究提出了专门的安全基础模型。通过针对性的训练，Yuvion VL 显著提升了对复杂、具有对抗性的多模态内容的理解与风险识别能力，为构建更安全的 AI 系统提供了重要工具。
papers.abstract_en: General-purpose models often struggle to reliably identify and understand real-worldmultimodal risks, largely due to the inherent multimodal adversarial nature of contentand AI safety. We present Yuvion VL, a family of multimodal large language models …

papers.title_en: AutoTrainess: Teaching Language Models to Improve Language Models Autonomously
papers.tldr: 尽管大语言模型在复杂任务上表现日益增强，但其训练过程仍高度依赖人工。本文提出 AutoTrainess 框架，旨在利用具备长程任务处理能力的模型智能体，实现语言模型的自主训练与优化。该方法通过自动化数据生成、模型微调与闭环评估，显著降低了人工干预成本，为构建能够自我进化的语言模型系统提供了重要参考和技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Training language models (LMs) remains a highly human-intensive process, even asfrontier language model agents become increasingly capable at softwareengineering and other long-horizon tasks. A central challenge is that autonomous …

papers.title_en: Understanding Why Language Models Hallucinate: Testing Reasoning Against Priors
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在揭示大语言模型产生幻觉的深层机制，重点探讨了模型内部先验知识与提示词推理之间的冲突。研究者通过对比实验分析了模型在拥有相关知识的情况下为何仍会违反约束。结果表明，幻觉往往源于模型过度依赖预训练阶段形成的先验偏见，而非单纯的知识匮乏。这一发现对于理解模型失效模式及提升其遵循指令的忠实度具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models often produce hallucinated answers that violate prompt-levelconstraints. A key diagnostic question is whether these failures reflect missingknowledge, or whether the model has the relevant information but follows the wrong …

papers.title_en: Do Medical Vision Language Models Actually See? A Counterfactual Grounding Framework and Hard-Negative Contrastive Training for Visually-Reliant Medical …
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）在问答中是依赖视觉证据还是文本捷径。作者提出了一个反事实评估框架来检测模型的视觉可靠性，并引入了硬负样本对比训练方法。研究发现现有模型普遍存在文本偏见，而提出的训练策略能显著增强模型对视觉信息的依赖，提升了医疗诊断的准确性和可解释性。
papers.abstract_en: Large vision language models (VLMs) report strong accuracy on medical question-answering, yet it remains unclear whether they reason from visual evidence orexploit textual shortcuts. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework that …

papers.title_en: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）通过并行去噪生成文本，是自回归模型的有力替代，但在通过后训练提升推理能力方面面临挑战。本文提出了 dOPSD（同策略自蒸馏）方法，通过在模型自身的生成分布上进行自蒸馏，有效增强了扩散模型的推理性能。该研究为 dLLMs 的优化提供了新路径，使其在复杂任务中表现更佳。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising amasked sequence, offering a parallel alternative to autoregressive models, buteliciting strong reasoning through post-training remains difficult: supervised fine …

papers.title_en: Dive Into the Implicit Biases of Low-rank Vision-language Alignment
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了视觉-语言对齐阶段的隐式偏差，挑战了该阶段必须进行全参数更新的传统观点。通过研究低秩适配（Low-rank）在连接预训练视觉编码器与大语言模型中的表现，揭示了其在对齐过程中的独特特性。本文为理解多模态模型的对齐机制提供了新视角，并为高效微调策略的应用提供了理论支持。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language alignment, the stage that bridges pretrained vision encoders andlarge language models, is widely treated as a form of pretraining requiring full-parameter updates. We challenge this view and investigate what happens when low …

papers.title_en: REVA-PO: Stabilizing Reinforcement Learning for Chest X-ray Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线报告自动生成中强化学习（RL）训练不稳定的问题，提出了REVA-PO框架。传统方法受限于固定的KL正则化，导致探索受限或训练波动。REVA-PO通过改进正则化机制，增强了模型在大型语言模型背景下的学习稳定性。实验证明，该方法能生成更准确、一致的医学报告，为医疗影像自动诊断提供了更可靠的强化学习方案。
papers.abstract_en: Automated chest X-ray report generation has recently benefited from reinforcementlearning (RL) and large language models. However, RL training often suffers frominstability or limited exploration due to fixed Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization and …

papers.title_en: A Unified Framework for Comprehensive Cardiac CT Segmentation and Phenotyping: Human-in-the-Loop Data Annotation, Vision Foundation Model Development …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对心脏CT结构量化难以规模化应用的挑战，提出了一个集成人机协同标注与视觉基础模型的统一框架。该框架通过高效的数据标注流程和强大的基础模型，实现了对心脏结构的全面分割与表型分析。这一方法不仅解决了测量效率低下的问题，还为大规模心脏影像数据的临床转化和精准医疗研究提供了关键的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Comprehensive quantification of cardiac structures from computed tomography (CT)remains limited not by data availability but by the scalability of measurements, whichmakes routine use impractical. Here we present a unified framework for …
